name: THOSE DAMN ALIENS! VR
short_description: Aliens have boarded your ship; It's time to take arms and defend yourself from the incoming hive. 'Those Damn Aliens' is a VR wave based first person shooter with campaign and survival modes.
detailed_description:
A VIRTUAL REALITY SCI-FI SHOOTER


Aliens have boarded your ship! Take up arms and battle waves of aliens in an attempt to save yourself in this VR wave based first person sci-fi shooter.

Living alone on space research centre X34-Zelta, you work endlessly in an attempt to find an antidote to a deadly virus that has begun spreading among the human population. Only you can stop the invasion and find a cure.

It's time to take arms, and fight back!

Features


  • Campaign Mode
  • Survival Mode
  • Multiple Weapon Types
  • Online Competitive Leader Boards (coming soon)
  • Stylish Sci-Fi Interface
  • Realistic Graphics
  • Immersive Audio
  • Action-packed Game-Play
